user_message: Give me the manager view on this Evergreen Solutions support ticket. Need this before my 2pm call.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-01 12:50 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Evergreen Solutions deployment blockers

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with deployment blockers. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
Date: 2024-02-14 09:44 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Evergreen Solutions deployment blockers

Our team encountered some challenges with deployment blockers. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 16:21 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Evergreen Solutions

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with deployment blockers. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Evergreen Solutions: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Champion-Change Email Signal -> Re-engagement Plan template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
